main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'biofouling TEP + organic + algal bloom + UF inadequate'.

alternatives.justification: 3 alts (Fe coloidal, MECH UF, MECH cartridge) anclados.

recommended_action.justification: CIP alcalino pH 11.5-12 + biocida fabricante + cítrico si needed.

requested_data.justification: Pide ATP feed — bio discriminator pero no el trigger gold (autopsia FTIR).

decision_change_condition.justification: Specific: autopsy Fe oxide predominante → coagulante.
